title: krameria bahiana
intro: Krameria bahiana, also known as Quebra-Pedra, is a plant species that belongs to the Krameria genus and is native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of kidney stones and urinary tract issues, due to its diuretic and lithotrophic effects. The health benefits of Krameria bahiana include its ability to promote urine production, relieve pain and inflammation, and prevent the formation of kidney stones. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparation.
